goal: verify that a real CLI-backed successful run persists normalized token usage from JSON events
steps: Create a disposable workspace copy for the repo runtime.
Start the demo in the background and wait for healthcheck success.
POST a normal execute intake task that should reach the real CLI runner.
Allow the worker pipeline to process the task until execute and deliver settle.
Inspect logs, persisted task rows, token usage rows, and execution metadata.
Clean up background processes before finishing.
inputs: intake payload for a tiny implementation task that should complete normally
assertions: The CLI runner is invoked through the real runtime path.
Execution metadata records parsed usage information.
At least one normalized token_usage row is persisted when the CLI emits usage data.

context.title: Real CLI token accounting verification
context.description: Trigger a real CLI-backed success path.
acceptance_criteria: Normalized token usage is persisted from the CLI JSON output

input_payload.instructions: Make a tiny implementation change so the runtime reaches the CLI runner and produces a normal successful result.
